_size_note: RECONCILIATION of the 1060.2 figure. model_download_mb (1060.2) came from os.walk + os.path.getsize over HF_HOME, and os.path.getsize FOLLOWS symlinks: the HF cache stores each model file once in blobs/ and exposes it again as a snapshots/ symlink, so os.walk counted the 14 model files twice. The real on-disk footprint is blobs-only = 530 MB decimal = 505.5 MiB (matches `du -sh HF_HOME/hub` = 505M; TableFormer 342M + docling-layout-heron 164M). The hf-xet transfer cache is NOT the cause (xet is ~0.2 MB). RapidOCR weights live in site-packages (outside HF_HOME): ~40.1 MB were DOWNLOADED at first PDF run (PP-OCRv4 .pth, per pdf_coldstart.log); resident total is 75.6 MB decimal (70.4 MiB) once the PP-OCRv6 .onnx files that ship with the pip install are included. So: on-disk models ~506 MiB (HF) + ~70 MiB (RapidOCR); first-run DOWNLOAD ~506 MiB HF + ~40 MB RapidOCR.
